title: SSA FY2024 Annual Performance Report — Extracted Text (with DDS performance)
description: Markdown text extracted from SSA's FY2024 Annual Performance Report (SSA_FY24_APR.pdf): strategic goals/objectives, performance measures, and disability-determination performance results — including state-by-state DDS metrics (processing times, quality-review rates, pending case backlogs) referenced in the FY24 APR.
geographic_coverage: National (United States), with state DDS performance detail

source.title: Annual Performance Report for Fiscal Year 2024 (SSA_FY24_APR.pdf)

notes: Computed: text extracted via Firecrawl from the published FY24 APR PDF (~144–147 KB markdown); narrative + performance tables, not a tidy machine table, so no per-column schema. Source URL is the exact PDF from apr-fy24.source.txt. FETCH_REPORT notes state performance tables can be parsed from this file into CSV as a follow-on.
